== Notes for [[Item:Q116602|Q116602]] ==

http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/BURGUNDIAN%20NOBILITY.htm

AUBRY [Alberic] de Narbonne, son of MAYEUL Vicomte de Narbonne & his wife --- (-[10 Sep] 945, bur Besançon Saint-Etienne). A charter dated 15 Jun 911, under which Arnust Archibishop of Narbonne donated property to Saint-Paul de Narbonne, names "infantes Majolo vicecomite et uxori suæ Raymundæ...Walchario et...Albericho vicecomite", the wording implying that the parents were deceased at that date[1170]. A genealogy of the Comtes de Mâcon, included in the cartulary of Saint-Vincent de Mâcon, names "Albericus Narbonensis" and refers to his marriage to "filiam Raculfi vicecomitis post mortem domini Bernonis Matiscensis episcopi", stating that he subsequently installed himself as first Comte de Mâcon[1171]. Comte de Mâcon, Sire de Bracon et de Salins. "Berno episcopus" donated property to "Albericus comes" by charter dated "die Martis Kal Jan anno VIII regnante Rodulfo rege" [930] subscribed by "comes Letaldus, uxor eius Berta"[1172], although, as noted below, the reference to Letaud's wife Berta suggests that this charter is misdated. "Albericus comes" donated property to Saint-Vincent de Mâcon by charter dated [936/41] subscribed by "Letaudi, Ermentrudis coniugis sue"[1173]. The necrology of Mâcon Cathedral records the death "IV Id Sep" of "Albericus comes"[1174], although this entry could alternatively refer to Count Aubry [II] (see below).

m TOLANA de Mâcon, daughter of RACULF Vicomte de Mâcon & his wife ---. The genealogy of the Comtes de Mâcon, included in the cartulary of Saint-Vincent de Mâcon, names "Albericus Narbonensis" and refers to his marriage to "filiam Raculfi vicecomitis post mortem domini Bernonis Matiscensis episcopi"[1175]. "Tolosane" is named as wife of Alberic in a charter of her son Letaud dated [12 Apr] 935 and "Etolane" mother of Letaud in the latter's charter dated 8 May [955][1176]. 942. "Letaudus comes et uxor mea Berta" donated property to Saint-Vincent-de-Mâcon for the souls of "patris mei Alberici…et matris mee Tolane…Irmengardis quondam uxoris sue" by charter dated to [941] subscribed by "Alberici filii sui"[1177].

Comte Aubry & his wife had three children:

1. LETAUD [Leotold] de Mâcon (915-3 Nov 961). The genealogy of the Comtes de Mâcon, included in the cartulary of Saint-Vincent de Mâcon, names "Letaudus filius eius [Alberici Narbonensis]"[1178]. He succeeded his father as Comte de Mâcon.

2. HUMBERT de Mâcon (-before 958). "Leutaldus atque et Umbertus filii…Alberici [comitis]" are named in an undated charter of Saint-Vincent de Mâcon[1179]. "Albericus comes…filii mei Letboldus et Umbertus" donated property to Saint-Vincent de Mâcon by charter dated [930][1180]. "Unberti fratris eius" consented to the donation of Letald Comte de Mâcon dated Feb 944[1181]. Sire de Salins.

3. ADELA [Tolana] de Mâcon (-after Jun 944). "Attale" is named as sister of "Letaudus comes" in the latter's donation to Cluny dated Jun 944[1182].
--------------------
Alberic I Vicomte de Narbonne, Count of Macon 1 2

Born: ABT 880 in Narbonne, Aude, Languedoc, France

Died: 945 in Macon, Saone-et-Loire, Bourgogne, France 2

Father: Mayeul I Vicomte de Narbonne b: ABT 845 in Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc, France

Mother: Raimodis (Raymonde) b: ABT 850 in France

Marriage 1 Etolane de Macon b: ABT 892 in Macon, Saone-et-Loire, Bourgogne, France

Children:

Letalde (Lietaud) I Count of Macon b: ABT 910 in Macon, Saone-et-Loire, Bourgogne, France

Adela de Salins b: ABT 912 in Salins-les-Bains, Jura, Franche-Comte, France

Humbert I Seigneur de Salins b: ABT 925 in Salins les Bains, Jura, Franche-Comte, France

Sources:

Title: Burke's Peerage & Baronetage, 106th Edition, Charles Mosley Editor-in-Chief, 1999

Page: 226

Text: Aubrey, Count of Macon

Title: The Plantagenet Ancestry, by William Henry Turton, 1968

Page: 6

*Aubri Of Narbonne Count De Maçon

born abt 0870 Narbonne, Aude, France

died abt 0945

father:

*Mayeul Viscount of Narbonne

died 15 Jun 0911

mother:

*Raimodis wife of Mayeul Vicount of Narbonne

died bef 11 Jun 0911

(end of information)

siblings:

*Francon II Vicompte de Narbonne

spouse:

*Attela De Maçon

born abt 0873 France

children:

*Lietaud Count De Maçon born abt 0907 France died 17 Sep 0965

*Humbert I Seigneur de Salins born about 0887 Macon, Saone, Bourgogne, France

died about 0958

biographical and/or anecdotal:

notes or source:

ancestry.com

_P_CCINFO 2-2438

VICOMTE OF NARBONNE

Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I16689
# ID: I16689
# Name: Vicount Of Narbonne AUBRI 1 2 3 4 5
# Sex: M
# Birth: 849 1 2 3 4 5
# Death: 28 FEB 942/43 1 2 3 4 5
# Burial: Besancon st.-Etienne 1 2 3 4 5
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 5
# Change Date: 17 OCT 2001 2 3 4 5
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA
4 TEXT Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004


[daveanthes.FTW]

DATE 28 APR 2000

OCCU Viscount de Narbonne ...
SOUR COMYN4.TAF (Compuserve) says 28-Feb- 943
GWALTNEY.ANC 2032178696 says 943;Royalty for Commoners, p. 77 says 945
COMYNJ.TAF (Compuserve), p. 11 says 28-Feb- 943/44
PAGE 29
QUAY 0
Count of Macon, Sire of Brecon and Salins - Royalty for Commoners, Roderick W.
Stuart, p. 77



Father: Vicount Of Narbonne MAYEUL b: ABT 830
Mother: Raimodis b: ABT 830

Marriage 1 Attela DE MACON b: ABT 850

* Married: 900 1 2 3 4 5

Children

1. Has Children Humbert DE SALINS b: 867
2. Has Children Leotald Count DE MACON b: 880


Sources:

1. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
3. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
4. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: 21 Jan 2004
5. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004

[s2.FTW]

[Brøderbund WFT Vol. 2, Ed. 1, Tree #1241, Date of Import: May 8, 1997]

!VICOMTE OF NARBONNE[Brøderbund WFT Vol. 2, Ed. 1, Tree #1241, Date of Import: May 8, 1997]

!VICOMTE OF NARBONNE

Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I00888
# ID: I00888
# Name: Albéric Ier DE MACON 1 2 3 4
# Sex: M
# Birth: ABT 880 1 2 3 4
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 4
# Change Date: 16 SEP 2001 2 3 4
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA
4 TEXT Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004



Father: Mayeul DE NARBONNE b: ABT 845
Mother: Raaimondis DE LIMOGES b: ABT 850

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

1. Has Children Robert DE CHALON b: ABT 905
2. Has No Children Létald Ier DE MACON b: 910
3. Has No Children Humbert Ier DE SALINS b: ABT 915


Sources:

1. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
3. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
4. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004


WFT 6122 Count Of Macon \Aubri I\

[3119] WSHNGT.ASC file (Geo Washington Ahnentafel) # 34902216 = 7356520

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Vicount Of Narbonne

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
